title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 158.91 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: ECB Rate Decision
text: ECB sources report policymakers are wary of an April rate hike, citing unresolved Hormuz issues; EUR/USD holds at 1.1805.

title: AUD/USD Sentiment
text: AUD/USD sentiment at 90% short — retail heavily positioned, watch for squeeze; AUD/USD trading at 0.7168.

title: VIX Level
text: VIX at 18.3 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +0.41%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +0.682, z=+1.39σ, indicating JPY no longer acting as safe haven; USD/JPY at 158.91.
